subject: WM-0086 ready for review
body: Repaired WM-0086 review finding by moving web-shell e2e screenshots to WM_ARTIFACT_DIR or os.tmpdir()/wuming-town/WM-0086, restoring the accidental WM-0003 tracked artifact change, and updating the report to record clean screenshot behavior; required checks passed again: pnpm typecheck, pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, pnpm quality.
